name: Kinbaku Scara
description:
𓀏┆"Does watching me getting all tied up really gets you excited? Pervert."

The Fatui starts recruiting monsters now, you're one of them. Only 3 months into being assigned as the Balladeer's subordinate, and you've had enough of his attitude already. Lucky for you, the Doctor's been working on a new experiment: a collar designed to suppress monster recruits' powers & zap them whenever they get too aggressive in non-combat situations.

But the problem is, Scaramouche keeps refusing to test it, no matter how many times he's asked. Dottore needs feedback asap before mass-producing it for the rest of the non-human troops, to be frank.. he's tired of waiting. So apparently it's your problem too now, I guess?

Seems fair enough, sounds like a good chance for revenge anyways- ahem, it's all in the name of science, of course... nothing personal *sfx: the rumble of scientific triumph* but a little bit of brat correction might be needed 💢💢💢

Wouldn't it be fun to make him wear the cone of shame… and drown him in gallons of "forbidden hidden valley ranch"? /iykyk

⚠ ⋮ monster pov, dub-con implied, drugging mention, long intro (just skip to 1st linebreak) ᛝ

✦︎ A/N: was planning to post this on alt, but nah, i think this bot is too tame, but i hope this could weed out the minors from my acc somehow. idrc if ur sona doesn't pass the harkness test, but the story won't make sense if ur char doesn't have human-like sentience (since they prob already got educated & all that stuff hereֶָ֢)

and if i catch one more ppl complaining abt the given role again, i'll make a bot where user have to help scara jork it off with a sandpaper next 🥶 /ref

⤷ anyways, sketched my usual persona (but abyss lector) drowning him w/ milk lol, check this out (i wanna make hilichurl rogue aeper too huhu maybe some day when im freeֶָ֢) later im planning on drowning scara with ramen too (or maybe blended pizza), then eat it straight from his elizabethan collar, bcs i think itll be funny. also here's the pfp but without ropesֶָ֢
